channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-28
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Mon 2026-06-22: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.5 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 3 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 3 kt S, water 62°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (S). Wed 2026-06-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 5 kt NNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.8 sec). Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 10 kt S, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (S). Sat 2026-06-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt SSW, water 63°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-06-28: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Mon 2026-06-22: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.5 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 3 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 3 kt S, water 62°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Wed 2026-06-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 5 kt NNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.8 sec).
  • Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 10 kt S, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Sat 2026-06-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt SSW, water 63°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-06-28: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
